posts.text:
"The first 2 days of this war cost $5.6 billion. I seem to remember a president coming into office on the pretext he would focus on America First. And yet he's cut healthcare, cut food assistance, sent the cost of everything higher, but we have plenty of money for foreign wars. Doesn't exactly sound like the Donald Trump from the campaign trail to me."

Video

Every six months they’re gonna claim they need to obliterate the same nuclear program.


Acyn (@Acyn)

Lindsey Graham on Iran: When this is over, we're going to obliterate their nuclear program

Video

Madeline Fry Schultz (@madelineefry)

Frankly we don’t talk about this enough

No one treats Americans dumber than Trump— but Kiley comes in a close second with his brand new “independent” schtick (even though he caucuses with and will caucus with Republicans).


Elex Michaelson (@Elex_Michaelson)

I press @KevinKileyCA, a Republican turned Independent, who he'd back for House Speaker if re-elected?

Could he vote for @hakeemjeffries & the Democrats?

"I'll decide at the time based on whoever the candidates are..."

"I'm not when I run telling people on how I'm going to vo

It’s the beginning of a forever war that is also basically over. We’re practically finished and also only getting started. This thing is basically done and also might never end.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Q: You said the war is 'very complete.' But your defense secretary says 'this is just the beginning.' So which is it?

TRUMP: You could say both

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2031132139274543287#m

This actually explains a lot.


Aaron Rupar (@atrupar)

Trump: "You daughter, she has to be of age. Like above 6 years old."

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/atrupar/status/2031121996411502704#m

This doesn’t change who he caucuses with nor does it change who is Speaker. It’s a con job to make himself seem more independent as he runs for election in CA-6. Don’t fall for it.


Kyle Griffin (@kylegriffin1)

NEW: Rep. Kevin Kiley just announced that his decision to leave the Republican Party and register as an Independent will take effect immediately — further Mike Johnson's margins in the House.
Community note: Kiley will still caucus with the Republicans, so there will be no meaningful ch

Trump: IT IS CALLED THE DEPARTMENT OF WAR NOW BECAUSE WE ARE NOT AFRAID OF WAR

Also Trump: we took a little excursion 🤗


Acyn (@Acyn)

Trump on Iran: We took a little excursion because we felt we had to do that to get rid of some evil. I think you'll see it is going to be a short-term excursion. SHORT TERM!

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/Acyn/status/2031111137576812832#m

White House: don't worry this totally won't be a forever war

Also White House:


DOW Rapid Response (@DOWResponse)

We have Only Just Begun to Fight.




— https://nitter.net/DOWResponse/status/2031073849853513747#m

Trump administration: IT'S THE DEPARTMENT OF WAR NOW. WE ARE NOT AFRAID OF WAR. THE DAYS OF BITCH ASS DEMOCRATS WHO ARE AFRAID TO SAY WAR ARE OVER. ITS WAR YOU PUSSIES.

Also Trump administration: We are currently engaged in a limited military incursion with Iran-- something of an armed conflict or perhaps temporary operation, if you will.
Watch the full interview: piped.video/ZDsrnYoW4qg

.@SenSanders: Pam Bondi 'has the responsibility to what Trump campaigned on: release the files! Release not three-quarters of them. Release all of them.'

Video

We’re at war! But also it’s not a war, it’s an operation. But also this war is gonna make them wish they were never born! But also it is merely a narrow military incursion. But also we didn’t change the name to the Department of War for nothing! But also let’s not gonna hung up on petty details like whether we’re at war or not. But also


Headquarters (@HQNewsNow)

Q: You just said the word 'war.' Earlier this week, Speaker Johnson said 'the US is not at war right now.' Is the US at war?

Hegset

but seriously folks what’s the deal with airline food


FactPost (@factpostnews)

JD Vance attempts to make a joke:

"I can't see any of you because these spotlights are glaring bright. The person who runs these spotlights must be a Democrat because I cannot see a single person in that crowd."

Video
  




— https://nitter.net/factpostnews/status/2031022486255469051#m
